title: feat: support image dataset search
known_problem: Large dataset-search PR touches service, app, and private pro. Fail clearly if pro submodule is unavailable.

commands.name: pro_submodule_guard
commands.shell: test -e pro || (echo 'private pro submodule is required for this PR' >&2; exit 2)
commands.reason: This PR changes private pro state; do not produce false positives without it.

commands.name: service_dataset_search_tests
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/core/dataset/search/index.test.ts test/core/dataset/search/defaultRecall.test.ts test/core/dataset/search/utils.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Run focused dataset search service tests.

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files after git clean before app build.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: Dataset search app API/UI must compile through app build.
